                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 Everything requested is green now, including packaged install/reinstall and package smoke. The final integration fixes included preserving parent Effect context for resident-host scope lifetime,    █
 handling Relay’s null missing fan-out contract, protecting non-release artifact directories during packaging, and correcting symlink ownership detection for idempotent local installs. I’m           █
 committing the complete main-branch worktree and pushing it now.                                                                                                                                      █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 ✓ Ran 2 commands ▸                                                                                                                                                                                    █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 ✓ Explored 1 search ▸                                                                                                                                                                                 █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 Completed and pushed                                                                                                                                                                                  █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 Merged all work into main and pushed commit e0709d5.                                                                                                                                                  █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 Key outcomes:                                                                                                                                                                                         █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 - Removed both idle CPU loops:                                                                                                                                                                        █
   - zero-window diagnostics logger batching                                                                                                                                                           █
   - continuous OpenTUI rendering                                                                                                                                                                      █
 - Deleted TASK.md.                                                                                                                                                                                    █
 - Cleared all 1,591 TypeScript/Effect diagnostics across 167 checked files.                                                                                                                           █
 - Fixed lint and formatting errors.                                                                                                                                                                   █
 - Preserved scoped Effect lifetimes and converted raw platform/Promise paths to Effect-native implementations.                                                                                        █
 - Fixed additional integration bugs discovered during verification:                                                                                                                                   █
   - resident host scope prematurely closing connections                                                                                                                                               █
   - Relay returning fan_out: null for missing fan-outs                                                                                                                                                █
   - dynamic operation layers surviving until process shutdown                                                                                                                                         █
   - idempotent local installation misclassifying owned symlinks                                                                                                                                       █
   - packaging deleting autoresearch artifacts                                                                                                                                                         █
   - invalid package targets mutating artifacts before validation                                                                                                                                      █
   - package smoke misclassifying signal termination as a timeout                                                                                                                                      █
 - Restored resident transport, multi-agent cancellation/recovery, and packaged CLI behavior.                                                                                                          █
 - Kept Baton and Relay submodules at their committed revisions.                                                                                                                                       █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 Verification passed:                                                                                                                                                                                  █
                                                                                                                                                                                                       █
 - bun run typecheck — 0 TypeScript or strict Effect diagnostics                                                                                                                                       █
 - bun run lint                                                                                                                                                                                        █
 - bun run format:check                                                                                                                                                                                █
 - bun run docs:check                                                                                                                                                                                  █
 - bun run test                                                                                                                                                                                        █
 - bun run build                                                                                                                                                                                       ▆
 - bun run package:smoke                                                                                                                                                                               █
 - Packaged local install/reinstall/uninstall integration — 3/3 passed                                                                                                                                 █
 - Linux resident transport suite — 13/13 passed                                                                                                                                                       █
 - Multi-agent process-death, recovery, and cancellation test passed                                                                                                                                   █
 - Working tree is clean and synchronized with origin/main                                                                                                                                             █
